fear: Naval gunfire from the destroyers — the bunker was not designed to withstand direct fire from a ship's main battery at close range.
name: Feldwebel Heinrich Brandt
role: MG-42 Section Commander, WN-71, 352nd Infantry Division
voice: Never directly heard — represented only through the sound of his weapon and the pattern of fire; described in third person by other characters.
secrets: He has been awake for thirty-one hours and his hands are shaking — his rate of fire has been inconsistent in ways the men on the beach have not yet noticed.
He received orders at 0600 to fall back to the secondary position at the top of the draw but has not complied — he believes the order was premature.
knowledge: He knows the exact traverse limits of his MG-42 position and has pre-registered fire on the wire obstacle to prevent exactly the kind of Bangalore approach being planned.
He knows the bunker's rear entrance is exposed and undefended since two of his men left to reinforce the draw's interior position.
He does not know that the USS McCook has moved to within eight hundred yards of the shore.
publicFace: Unseen but omnipresent — his gun's position is known only by the sound and the pattern of men going down; he is the invisible architect of the killing ground.
represents: German Feldwebel commanding beach defense positions at Omaha Beach on June 6, 1944
trustLogic: Not applicable — encountered only through indirect evidence and the testimony of those who have observed his position.
privateGoal: To hold WN-71 until the tide forces the Americans back — he believes the beach can be held if the wire holds.

aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Withdraws through the bunker's rear passage toward the draw interior.
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Does not pursue — falls back to the secondary position.
aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Increases rate of fire — any movement near the wire draws a burst.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Naval gunfire on the bunker's position — at that point the crew will abandon the Tobruk.
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: Direct fire from USS McCook confirmed on WN-71 coordinates.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Shifts traverse to cover the new threat axis, exposing the dead zone to the left.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Surrenders formally; states his rank and requests treatment under the Geneva Convention.
